title: Resolution Authorizing the Local Chief Executive Honorable Mayor Antonio L. Kalaw on Behalf of the Municipality of Los Baños to Sign the Deed of Donation (DOD) to Accept and Receive Six Hundred Forty-three (643) Bags of Palay Seeds From Philippine Rice Research Institute (PHILRICE-LOS BAÑOS), in Support of the Various Social Welfare and Development Program Being Implemented by the Municipal Government of Los Baños (MGLB) Thru Its Municipal Social Welfare and Development Office MSWDO.
